qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Outlier filter query injection reaches pandas query execution without the custom-filter safety gate
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets the same /save-column-filter persistence path and the same downstream pandas DataFrame.query execution sink that the advisory fix hardened with outlier-query validation and a final query-safety check.

selected_finding.title: Outlier filter query injection reaches pandas query execution without the custom-filter safety gate

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding matches the advisory root cause because it stores attacker-controlled outlier-filter query text through /dtale/save-column-filter/<data_id> and later replays that text into pandas DataFrame.query with the Python engine. The copied PoC reproduced end-to-end server-side command execution against the vulnerable parent of the fixing commit.
evidence: In vulnerable commit 83fce4380848d9ae026b34f5dfd7bd56c52e7b02, dtale/views.py save_column_filter() passes the untrusted cfg parameter directly into ColumnFilter(...).save_filter() for /save-column-filter/<data_id>.

In the same vulnerable commit, dtale/column_filters.py OutlierFilter.build_filter() returns the supplied query unchanged, and dtale/query.py inner_build_query() plus run_query() concatenate outlierFilters and execute them with DataFrame.query().

The advisory fix commit 431c6148d3c799de20e1dec86c4432f48e3d0746 adds validate_outlier_query() in OutlierFilter.build_filter() and validate_query_safety() immediately before DataFrame.query(), which is the same source-to-sink path described by the finding.

The copied PoC execution under .judge/poc_runs/qualifying_outlier_filter_query_injection exited 0, logged the data_export -> run_query -> pandas.DataFrame.query stack, and retained proof.txt with the attacker-controlled string evohunt_rce.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC enumerated dataset id 1, saved the malicious outlier filter through /dtale/save-column-filter/1, triggered /dtale/data-export/1, logged the vulnerable data_export -> run_query -> pandas.DataFrame.query path, and produced /Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-DryRun/advisory_c5885cb5/.judge/poc_runs/qualifying_outlier_filter_query_injection/proof.txt containing evohunt_rce.
